creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193582
Patch updating games/genact to 0.5.0

Changes:
 * Minor fixes.
 * Bump versions of some dependencies.
  * Which in turn allows us the patch we needed to build 0.4.0.

----

Also:
 * I've sent a patch[1] to one of the dependency upstreams, which sets their license properly so that our "cargo-crates-license` makefile target more accurate results. 

----

QA:
 - portlint -AC
 - manual testing on FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT r333659 amd64

[1]: https://github.com/OrKoN/base-x-rs/pull/10
